mapper.sql: t.id, t.enterprise_id, t.audit_year, t.task_type, t.task_title, t.status, t.assignee_id, t.assign_time, t.deadline, t.complete_time, t.result, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , e.enterprise_name AS enterprise_name, u.real_name AS assignee_name FROM aw_audit_task t LEFT JOIN ent_enterprise e ON e.id = t.enterprise_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT , e.enterprise_name AS enterprise_name, u.real_name AS assignee_name FROM aw_audit_task t LEFT JOIN ent_enterprise e ON e.id = t.enterprise_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE t.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND t.audit_year = #{auditYear} AND t.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aw_audit_task (enterprise_id, audit_year, task_type, task_title, status, assignee_id, assign_time, deadline, result, create_by) VALUES (#{enterpriseId}, #{auditYear}, #{taskType}, #{taskTitle}, #{status}, #{assigneeId}, #{assignTime}, #{deadline}, #{result}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE aw_audit_task
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, status = #{status}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, assign_time = #{assignTime}, deadline = #{deadline}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, result = #{result}, task_title = #{taskTitle},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE aw_audit_task SET result = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
